lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Phantom ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Phantom
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, price, and outfitting reference for the Krait Phantom.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Phantom hull profile, internal layout, hardpoints, and role notes.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: Release-window first impressions of the Krait Phantom, comparing its range-first multirole profile against the Krait Mk II.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Compares the Phantom against the DBX and Asp Explorer for exploration, weighing jump range and medium-ship trade-offs.
